title: Slow Reserve Requirement Forecast
description: Slow Reserve, separated into Negative Slow Reserve (NSR) and Positive Slow Reserve (PSR), is primarily aimed at reacting to post-fault disturbances to restore energy imbalances to +/- 0.2Hz within 15 minutes of a loss event (generation or demand). The service is procured via a daily auction at 14:00 for delivery between 23:00 and 23:00 D+1. This data set contains the daily forecast of requirements for procurement of Positive Slow Reserve and Negative Slow Reserve. The dataset is updated monthly.
